answer_en:
Palmaris Brevis m.
Wrinkles the skin on the ulnar side of the palm of the hand and deepens the hollow of the hand by accentuating the hypothenar eminence

details: Wrinkles the skin on the ulnar side of the palm of the hand and deepens the hollow of the hand by accentuating the hypothenar eminence

title: Palmar Surface of Hand (Right Side)
